message:
feat(core,pager,mvcc,vdbe): reduce per-statement allocation overhead on autocommit hot paths

Core (connection.rs):
- Introduce TableExecutionRuntimeInputs to consolidate schema metadata
  gathering into a single method, sharing Arc-wrapped structural maps
  (rowid aliases, column counts, index sort flags) across executions
  instead of cloning HashMaps each time.
- Cache column default SQL in TableExecutionMetadataCacheEntry and skip
  evaluation passes entirely when no schema defaults exist; add
  FSQLITE_COLUMN_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_PASSES profiling counter.
- Replace create_child() with clone() for op_cx and VDBE execution
  contexts—hot-path SQL does not need independent cancellation trees.
- Add _with_cx variants for ensure_autocommit_txn and
  resolve_autocommit_txn so the same Cx flows through
  begin/dispatch/commit without re-creating it.
- Reuse pager publication binding from memdb staleness check when
  opening concurrent autocommit transactions (one refresh instead of
  two).
- Defer SSI snapshot capture in concurrent commit preparation to the
  error path—successful plans never inspect it.
- Guard tracing span creation and mvcc commit debug logging behind
  tracing::enabled!() checks to avoid span allocation when tracing is
  disabled.
- Switch internal metadata maps from std HashMap to hashbrown HashMap.

Pager (pager.rs):
- Merge publish_committed_metadata + publish_committed_pages into a
  single publish_committed_state that atomically inserts dirty pages
  during the snapshot-plane update, reducing publication write count for
  small autocommit writes from N+1 to 1.
- Skip post-commit shared-cache admission for WAL-mode commits since
  readers prefer the published snapshot plane or WAL backend.
- Add publication_write_count() metric and tests verifying batched
  publication and WAL cache-skip behavior.

MVCC (begin_concurrent.rs):
- Add can_use_uncontended_prepare_fast_path() that bypasses full SSI
  edge discovery when only one session is active and no committed
  history overlaps the transaction's begin sequence.
- Wire the fast path into prepare_concurrent_commit_with_ssi.
- Add unit tests covering single-session eligibility, multi-session
  rejection, and post-prune fast-path activation.

VDBE (engine.rs):
- Wrap rowid_alias_col, table_column_count, column_defaults, and
  index_desc_flags maps in Arc so the engine can accept shared
  references without cloning.
- Add set_shared_* methods alongside existing owned-value setters.
- Replace create_child() with clone() for derive_execution_cx.

E2E (bd_1lsfu_1_operation_baselines.rs):
- Add manual_perf_probe_write_10k_autocommit_prepared_and_ad_hoc test
  (ignored by default) comparing csqlite vs fsqlite write throughput
  for prepared and ad-hoc 10k-row autocommit insert workloads.

Misc:
- Add .rchignore for remote compilation helper (excludes tmp_golden/).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
